secureAreaScreen.successMessage: You logged into a secure area!
secureAreaScreen.heading: Secure Area
secureAreaScreen.bodyText: Welcome to the Secure Area. When you are done click logout below.

loginScreen.logoutSuccess: You logged out of the secure area!

loginScreen.instructions: This is where you can log into the secure area. Enter tomsmith for the username and SuperSecretPassword! for the password. If the information is wrong you should see error messages.
